## Checklist

- [ ] Tests pass (`uv run pytest`)
- [ ] Lint & format pass (`uv run ruff check . && uv run ruff format .`)
- [ ] Pre-commit hooks pass (`uv run pre-commit run --all-files`)
- [ ] Type-check passes (`uv run mypy src tests`)
- [ ] [Unreleased] entry added to `CHANGELOG.md` if user-visible
- [ ] CI green
